saleOrRent.title: Sale or Rent
saleOrRent.description: Search for properties for sale or rent

location.title: Location
location.description: Optional location filter (e.g., 'dublin', 'cork', 'galway'). Leave empty for all of Ireland

maxProperties.title: Maximum Properties
maxProperties.description: Maximum number of properties to scrape. Set to -1 for unlimited. Default is 20.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy used to reach Daft.ie. Datacenter works for low volume; residential (with country Ireland) is more reliable against Cloudflare but billed per GB. Billed to the account running the actor.
